metadata.purpose: Intermediate review record for segment-level airway direction reassessment. Not consumed by app logic.
notes: Use this file as the staging area before changing route-direction-metadata.json or routePlanner.js.
uniformRoutes can likely keep one direction value for every segment.
segmentSplitCandidates need segment-level overrides or conditional handling.
